ABS.description: Absolute value (vector) computes the absolute value of each vector element and writes the result to the destination vector.

operands.<Vd>: Is the name of the SIMD&FP destination register
operands.<Vn>: Is the name of the SIMD&FP source register

ADD.description: Add (immediate) adds a register value and an optionally-shifted immediate value, and writes the result to the destination register.

operands.<Wd>: Is the 32-bit name of the general-purpose destination register
operands.<Wn>: Is the 32-bit name of the source register
operands.<imm>: Is an unsigned immediate, in the range 0 to 4095

CRC32.description: Starting with an initial value in the first operand, accumulates a CRC32 value for the second operand and stores the result in the destination operand.

LDR.description: Load Register (immediate) loads a word or doubleword from memory and writes it to a register.

operands.<Wt>: Is the 32-bit name of the general-purpose register to be loaded
operands.<Xn|SP>: Is the 64-bit name of the base register
operands.<simm>: Is the signed immediate byte offset
